name: lightscope-ce
description: A high-performance web analytics platform powered by ClickHouse.

scripts.ci: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run docker:up -d && node utils/wait-for-services.js && pnpm --filter @lightscope-ce/e2e run test:e2e && pnpm run docker:down
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run docker:up -d && node utils/wait-for-services.js && pnpm --recursive --if-present run test:integration ; pnpm run docker:down
